Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(******************************************************************************************

 Enriched profunctors

 In this file, we define enriched profunctors. Usually, enriched profunctors are defined as
 follows: let `V` be a symmetric monoidal closed category, then an enriched profunctor from
 a `V`-enriched category `E₁` to a `V`-enriched category `E₂` is given by an enriched
 profunctor from the tensor of `E₂^op` and `E₁` to the self-enriched category `V`.

 We made a couple of variations to this definition.
 1. First of all, we use a whiskered style. Concretely, this that rather than having a
    single functorial action which takes morphisms in `E₂` and in `E₁`, we have two
    functorial actions. One that takes a morphism in `E₂` and one that takes a morphism in
    `E₁`. This concept is further explained in the file `WhiskeredBifunctors` in the directory
    `EnrichedCats.Bifunctors`.
 2. Second, since we are looking at `E₂^op`, we modify our definition accordingly. More
    specifically, in [enriched_profunctor_data]. we do not mention the opposite category
    explicitly. Instead, we have an action `E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⊗ P x₁ y --> P x₂ y` where we
    already reversed the direction.
 3. Third, the target of an enriched profunctor is the self-enriched category. In the
    self-enriched category, the hom-objects are given by the right adjoint of the tensor
    (i.e., linear function spaces). As such, whenever we are going to construct a morphism
    to such a hom-object, we are going to use a exponential transposes (i.e., lambda
    abstractions). For this reason, in the definition [enriched_profunctor_data], we do
    not mention the right adjoint, but we already took all necessary exponential transposes.
 4. Finally, the laws are rephrased to fit nicely with the aforementioned changes. The
    main difference is caused by the fact that the left and right action are both defined
    as a exponential transpose (i.e., lambda abstraction), and this allows us to simplify
    the laws of whiskered bifunctors (see [enriched_profunctor_laws]).

 We also show that our definition is equivalent to the definition of enriched profunctors
 via whiskered bifunctors, and thus it is equivalent to the usual definition of enriched
 profunctors. Finally, we give an action on morphisms of profunctors

 Contents
 1. Enriched profunctors
 2. Accessors
 3. Equivalence with whiskered bifunctors
 4. Action on morphisms in the underlying category

 ******************************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.OppositeCategory.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Enrichment.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Enriched.Enriched.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Enriched.EnrichmentEquiv.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Examples.Tensor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Bifunctors.WhiskeredBifunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Examples.SelfEnriched.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Examples.OppositeEnriched.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.WhiskeredBifunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Symmetric.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Closed.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope moncat.

Import MonoidalNotations.

Opaque sym_mon_braiding.

(** * 1. Enriched profunctors *)
Definition enriched_profunctor_data
           {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (E₁ : enrichment C₁ V)
           (E₂ : enrichment C₂ V)
  : UU
  := ∑ (P : C₂ → C₁ → V),
     (∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₂)
        (y : C₁),
      E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⊗ P x₁ y --> P x₂ y)
     ×
     (∏ (x : C₂)
        (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
      E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⊗ P x y₁ --> P x y₂).

Definition make_enriched_profunctor_data
           {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {E₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
           {E₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
           (P : C₂ → C₁ → V)
           (Pl : ∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₂)
                   (y : C₁),
                 E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⊗ P x₁ y --> P x₂ y)
          (Pr : ∏ (x : C₂)
                  (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
                E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⊗ P x y₁ --> P x y₂)
  : enriched_profunctor_data E₁ E₂
  := P ,, Pl ,, Pr.

Definition enriched_profunctor_ob
           {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {E₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
           {E₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
           (P : enriched_profunctor_data E₁ E₂)
           (y : C₂)
           (x : C₁)
  : V
  := pr1 P y x.

Coercion enriched_profunctor_ob : enriched_profunctor_data >-> Funclass.

Definition lmap_e
           {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {E₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
           {E₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
           (P : enriched_profunctor_data E₁ E₂)
           (x₁ x₂ : C₂)
           (y : C₁)
  : E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄ ⊗ P x₁ y --> P x₂ y
  := pr12 P x₁ x₂ y.

Definition rmap_e
           {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {E₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
           {E₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
           (P : enriched_profunctor_data E₁ E₂)
           (x : C₂)
           (y₁ y₂ : C₁)
  : E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⊗ P x y₁ --> P x y₂
  := pr22 P x y₁ y₂.

Definition enriched_profunctor_laws
           {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {E₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
           {E₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
           (P : enriched_profunctor_data E₁ E₂)
  : UU
  := (∏ (x : C₂)
        (y : C₁),
      enriched_id E₂ x #⊗ identity (P x y) · lmap_e P x x y
      =
      mon_lunitor (P x y))
     ×
     (∏ (x : C₂)
        (y : C₁),
      enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (P x y) · rmap_e P x y y
      =
      mon_lunitor (P x y))
     ×
     (∏ (x₁ x₂ x₃ : C₂)
        (y : C₁),
      (sym_mon_braiding V _ _ · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁) #⊗ identity _
      · lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y
      =
      mon_lassociator _ _ _
      · identity _ #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
      · lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y)
     ×
     (∏ (x : C₂)
        (y₁ y₂ y₃ : C₁),
      enriched_comp E₁ y₁ y₂ y₃ #⊗ identity (P x y₁)
      · rmap_e P x y₁ y₃
      =
      mon_lassociator _ _ _
      · identity _ #⊗ rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
      · rmap_e P x y₂ y₃)
     ×
     (∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₂)
        (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
     sym_mon_braiding V _ _ #⊗ identity _
     · mon_lassociator _ _ _
     · identity _ #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
     · rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂
     =
     mon_lassociator _ _ _
     · identity _ #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
     · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂).


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor_data E₁ E₂
isaprop (enriched_profunctor_laws P)


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor_data E₁ E₂
isaprop (enriched_profunctor_laws P)

  repeat (use isapropdirprod) ; repeat (use impred ; intro) ; apply homset_property.
Qed.

Definition enriched_profunctor
           {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (E₁ : enrichment C₁ V)
           (E₂ : enrichment C₂ V)
  : UU
  := ∑ (P : enriched_profunctor_data E₁ E₂),
     enriched_profunctor_laws P.

Notation "E₁ ↛e E₂" := (enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂)
                         (at level 99, only parsing) : cat. (* \nrightarrow *)

Definition make_enriched_profunctor
           {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {E₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
           {E₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
           (P : enriched_profunctor_data E₁ E₂)
           (HP : enriched_profunctor_laws P)
  : E₁ ↛e E₂
  := P ,, HP.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_data E₁ E₂


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_data E₁ E₂

  exact (pr1 P).
Defined.

(** * 2. Accessors *)
Section Accessors.
  Context {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
          {C₁ C₂ : category}
          {E₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
          {E₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
          (P : E₁ ↛e E₂).

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
enriched_id E₂ x #⊗ identity (P x y) · lmap_e P x x y =
mon_lunitor (P x y)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
enriched_id E₂ x #⊗ identity (P x y) · lmap_e P x x y =
mon_lunitor (P x y)

    exact (pr12 P x y).
  Defined.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (P x y) · rmap_e P x y y =
mon_lunitor (P x y)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (P x y) · rmap_e P x y y =
mon_lunitor (P x y)

    exact (pr122 P x y).
  Defined.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y

    exact (pr1 (pr222 P) x₁ x₂ x₃ y).
  Defined.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
      · lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
      · lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y)) =
enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
      · lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y)) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
?b =
enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
      · lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y)) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
   · lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
   · lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y) =
enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y =
enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
 · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁)) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y =
enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y =
enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
(identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y =
enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y =
enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y =
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂

y: C₁
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y =
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y =
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
   · (enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
      · lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y =
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
      · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₁ y)
      · identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
      · lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
      · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₁ y)
      · identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
      · lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y)) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
      · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₁ y)
      · identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
      · lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y)) = ?b

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
?b =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂

y: C₁

  (P x₁ y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
      · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
       (P x₁ y)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
   · lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y = ?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄))
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y = ?t2

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂

y: C₁
identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄))
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ P x₁ y)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
   · lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
identity
  ((E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ P x₁ y))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
enriched_comp E₁ y₁ y₂ y₃ #⊗ identity (P x y₁)
· rmap_e P x y₁ y₃ =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· rmap_e P x y₂ y₃

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
enriched_comp E₁ y₁ y₂ y₃ #⊗ identity (P x y₁)
· rmap_e P x y₁ y₃ =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· rmap_e P x y₂ y₃

    exact (pr12 (pr222 P) x y₁ y₂ y₃).
  Defined.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

E₂: enrichment C₂ V

identity (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· rmap_e P x y₂ y₃ =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x y₁)
· enriched_comp E₁ y₁ y₂ y₃ #⊗ identity (P x y₁)
· rmap_e P x y₁ y₃

  (P x y₁)
· enriched_comp E₁ y₁ y₂ y₃ #⊗ identity (P x y₁)
· rmap_e P x y₁ y₃

· rmap_e P x y₂ y₃ =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P x y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· rmap_e P x y₂ y₃

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· rmap_e P x y₂ y₃ =
identity
  ((E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P x y₁))
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· rmap_e P x y₂ y₃

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· rmap_e P x y₂ y₃ =
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· rmap_e P x y₂ y₃

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
· rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂ =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
· rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂ =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂

    exact (pr22 (pr222 P) x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂).
  Defined.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
· rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂ =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂

C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
· rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂ =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
· rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂ =
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P x₁ y₁)
      · (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
         · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂)))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P x₁ y₁)
      · (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
         · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂))) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
· rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂

  (P x₁ y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P x₁ y₁)
      · (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
         · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
?b =
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
· rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂

   · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂) = ?t2

#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
· rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂ = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₁ y₁)
      · identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
      · rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂)) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
· rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂

  (P x₁ y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₁ y₁)
      · identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
      · rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂)) = ?b

C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₁ y₁)

      · rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂)) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
       (P x₁ y₁)
   · identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
   · rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂) = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
· rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂ = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
· rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂ = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄))
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
· rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂ = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
· rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂ = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
· rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂ = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y₁)
   · identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
   · rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
· rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
· rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂ =
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
· rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity
  ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ P x₁ y₁))
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
· rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂ =
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
· rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
· rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂ =
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
· rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂ =
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
· rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂ =
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
· rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂ =
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        (P x₁ y₁)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
         · rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂)))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂ =
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        (P x₁ y₁)
      · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₁ y₁)
         · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
             (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
         · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
             (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P x₁ y₁)
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
           #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂ · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂)))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂ =
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        (P x₁ y₁)
      · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₁ y₁)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
            · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
                 (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P x₁ y₁)
               · (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
                  #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
                  · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂))))))

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        (P x₁ y₁)
      · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₁ y₁)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
            · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
                 (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P x₁ y₁)
               · (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
                  #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
                  · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂)))))) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        (P x₁ y₁)
      · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₁ y₁)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
            · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
                 (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P x₁ y₁)
               · (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
                  #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
                  · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂)))))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
?b =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        (P x₁ y₁)
      · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (P x₁ y₁)
         · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
            · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
                 (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P x₁ y₁)
               · (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
                  #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
                  · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂)))))) = ?b

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
           (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P x₁ y₁)
         · (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂ · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂)))) =
?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂ = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ P x₁ y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂ = ?t2

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂ = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
          (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (P x₁ y₁)
      · identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
      · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂)) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂

  (P x₁ y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

      · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)

      · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂)) = ?b

  (P x₁ y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂

 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄))
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂

· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

V: sym_mon_closed_cat

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y₁)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
   · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂ =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity
  ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ P x₁ y₁))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂ =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂ =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂

    apply idpath.
  Qed.
End Accessors.

(** * 3. Equivalence with whiskered bifunctors *)
Section FromEnrichedProfunctor.
  Context {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
          {C₁ C₂ : category}
          {E₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
          {E₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
          (P : E₁ ↛e E₂).

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_data (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_data (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
C₂ ^opp → C₁ → V
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₂ ^opp) (y : C₁),
V ⟦ op_enrichment V E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄,
self_enrichment V ⦃ ?F x₁ y, ?F x₂ y ⦄ ⟧
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x : C₂ ^opp) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
V ⟦ E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄,
self_enrichment V ⦃ ?F x y₁, ?F x y₂ ⦄ ⟧

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
C₂ ^opp → C₁ → V
 exact (λ y x, P y x).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₂ ^opp) (y : C₁),
V ⟦ op_enrichment V E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄,
self_enrichment V
⦃ (λ (y0 : C₂ ^opp) (x : C₁), P y0 x) x₁ y,
(λ (y0 : C₂ ^opp) (x : C₁), P y0 x) x₂ y ⦄ ⟧
 exact (λ x₁ x₂ y, internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y)).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x : C₂ ^opp) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
V ⟦ E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄,
self_enrichment V
⦃ (λ (y : C₂ ^opp) (x0 : C₁), P y x0) x y₁,
(λ (y : C₂ ^opp) (x0 : C₁), P y x0) x y₂ ⦄ ⟧
 exact (λ x y₁ y₂, internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₂)).
  Defined.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_laws
  enriched_profunctor_to_whiskered_data

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_laws
  enriched_profunctor_to_whiskered_data

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x : C₂) (y : C₁),
enriched_id E₂ x · internal_lam (lmap_e P x x y) =
internal_id (P x y)
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x : C₂) (y : C₁),
enriched_id E₁ y · internal_lam (rmap_e P x y y) =
internal_id (P x y)
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x₁ x₂ x₃ : C₂) (y : C₁),
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁
· internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y) =
internal_lam (lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y)
#⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y)
· internal_comp (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y)
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x : C₂) (y₁ y₂ y₃ : C₁),
enriched_comp E₁ y₁ y₂ y₃
· internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₃) =
internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₂ y₃)
#⊗ internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₂)
· internal_comp (P x y₁) (P x y₂) (P x y₃)
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₂) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂)
#⊗ internal_lam (rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂)
· internal_comp (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· internal_lam (rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁)
· internal_comp (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x : C₂) (y : C₁),
enriched_id E₂ x · internal_lam (lmap_e P x x y) =
internal_id (P x y)
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
enriched_id E₂ x · internal_lam (lmap_e P x x y) =
internal_id (P x y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
enriched_id E₂ x · internal_lam (lmap_e P x x y) =
internal_lam (mon_lunitor (P x y))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, P x y ⟧),
(enriched_id E₂ x · internal_lam (lmap_e P x x y))
#⊗ h · internal_eval (P x y) (P x y) =
internal_lam (mon_lunitor (P x y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x y) (P x y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y ⟧
(enriched_id E₂ x · internal_lam (lmap_e P x x y))
#⊗ h · internal_eval (P x y) (P x y) =
internal_lam (mon_lunitor (P x y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x y) (P x y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y ⟧
enriched_id E₂ x #⊗ h
· internal_lam (lmap_e P x x y) #⊗ identity (P x y)
· internal_eval (P x y) (P x y) =
internal_lam (mon_lunitor (P x y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x y) (P x y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y ⟧
enriched_id E₂ x #⊗ h
· (internal_lam (lmap_e P x x y) #⊗ identity (P x y)
   · internal_eval (P x y) (P x y)) =
internal_lam (mon_lunitor (P x y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x y) (P x y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y ⟧
enriched_id E₂ x #⊗ h · lmap_e P x x y =
internal_lam (mon_lunitor (P x y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x y) (P x y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y ⟧
internal_lam (mon_lunitor (P x y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x y) (P x y) =
enriched_id E₂ x #⊗ h · lmap_e P x x y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· internal_lam (mon_lunitor (P x y))
  #⊗ identity (P x y) · internal_eval (P x y) (P x y) =
enriched_id E₂ x #⊗ h · lmap_e P x x y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (internal_lam (mon_lunitor (P x y))
   #⊗ identity (P x y) · internal_eval (P x y) (P x y)) =
enriched_id E₂ x #⊗ h · lmap_e P x x y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

x: C₂

h: V ⟦ z, P x y ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h · mon_lunitor (P x y) =
enriched_id E₂ x #⊗ h · lmap_e P x x y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

x: C₂

· lmap_e P x x y =

x: C₂

z: V

identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (enriched_id E₂ x #⊗ identity (P x y)
   · lmap_e P x x y) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h · mon_lunitor (P x y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

x: C₂

z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y ⟧

mon_lunitor (P x y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
enriched_id E₂ x #⊗ identity (P x y) · lmap_e P x x y =
mon_lunitor (P x y)

      exact (lmap_e_id P x y).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x : C₂) (y : C₁),
enriched_id E₁ y · internal_lam (rmap_e P x y y) =
internal_id (P x y)

identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (P x y)
· rmap_e P x y y =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h · mon_lunitor (P x y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h
· (enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (P x y)
   · rmap_e P x y y) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ h · mon_lunitor (P x y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y ⟧
enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (P x y) · rmap_e P x y y =
mon_lunitor (P x y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
enriched_id E₁ y #⊗ identity (P x y) · rmap_e P x y y =
mon_lunitor (P x y)

      exact (rmap_e_id P x y).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x₁ x₂ x₃ : C₂) (y : C₁),
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁
· internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y) =
internal_lam (lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y)
#⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y)
· internal_comp (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y)
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁
· internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y) =
internal_lam (lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y)
#⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y)
· internal_comp (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, P x₁ y ⟧),
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁
 · internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₃ y) =
(internal_lam (lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y)
 #⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y)
 · internal_comp (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₃ y)

x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁

h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁
 · internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₃ y) =
(internal_lam (lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y)
 #⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y)
 · internal_comp (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₃ y)

 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁) #⊗ h
· internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₃ y) =

 #⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y)
 · internal_comp (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y)) #⊗ h

 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁) #⊗ h
· (internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)

 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁) #⊗ h · lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y =

 #⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y)
 · internal_comp (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₃ y) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁) #⊗ h · lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y

C₁, C₂: category

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂

y: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y ⟧
(internal_lam (lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y)
 #⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y)
 · internal_comp (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₃ y) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y ⟧
?b =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁) #⊗ h · lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y

(internal_lam (lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y)
 #⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y)
 · internal_comp (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₃ y) = ?b

 #⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y)) #⊗ h
· internal_comp (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₃ y) = ?b

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y ⟧
(internal_lam (lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y)
 #⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y)) #⊗ h
· (internal_comp (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
   · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₃ y)) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y ⟧
(internal_lam (lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y)
 #⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y)) #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (mon_lassociator (P x₂ y ⊸ P x₃ y)
        (P x₁ y ⊸ P x₂ y) (P x₁ y)
      · identity (P x₂ y ⊸ P x₃ y)
        #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y)
      · internal_eval (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y))
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
   · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₃ y)) = ?b

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y ⟧
(internal_lam (lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y)
 #⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P x₂ y ⊸ P x₃ y) (P x₁ y ⊸ P x₂ y)
     (P x₁ y)
   · identity (P x₂ y ⊸ P x₃ y)
     #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y)
   · internal_eval (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y)) = ?b

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y ⟧
(internal_lam (lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y)
 #⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y)) #⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (P x₂ y ⊸ P x₃ y) (P x₁ y ⊸ P x₂ y)
    (P x₁ y)
· identity (P x₂ y ⊸ P x₃ y)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) z
· internal_lam (lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y)
  #⊗ (internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y) #⊗ h)
· identity (P x₂ y ⊸ P x₃ y)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y) = ?b

z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) z
· (internal_lam (lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y)
   #⊗ (internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y) #⊗ h)
   · (identity (P x₂ y ⊸ P x₃ y)
      #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y)
      · internal_eval (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y))) = ?b

internal_lam (lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y)
#⊗ (internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y) #⊗ h)
· (identity (P x₂ y ⊸ P x₃ y)
   #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y)
   · internal_eval (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y)) = ?t2

identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y =

          apply idpath.

· internal_lam (lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y) #⊗ identity (P x₂ y)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y ⟧
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y)
· (internal_lam (lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y)
   #⊗ identity (P x₂ y)
   · internal_eval (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y)) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y ⟧
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y)
· lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) z
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h
       · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y) · lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁) #⊗ h · lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) z
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
   · lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁) #⊗ h · lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) z
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ h)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁) #⊗ h · lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y ⟧
(identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄))
#⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁) #⊗ h · lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y ⟧
identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁) #⊗ h · lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁) #⊗ h · lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y =
identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y ⟧
identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y =
identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y ⟧
identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
   · lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y) =
identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
      · lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
   · lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
   · lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· lmap_e P x₁ x₃ y =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e P x₂ x₃ y

      exact (lmap_e_comp P x₁ x₂ x₃ y).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x : C₂) (y₁ y₂ y₃ : C₁),
enriched_comp E₁ y₁ y₂ y₃
· internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₃) =
internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₂ y₃)
#⊗ internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₂)
· internal_comp (P x y₁) (P x y₂) (P x y₃)
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
enriched_comp E₁ y₁ y₂ y₃
· internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₃) =
internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₂ y₃)
#⊗ internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₂)
· internal_comp (P x y₁) (P x y₂) (P x y₃)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, P x y₁ ⟧),
(enriched_comp E₁ y₁ y₂ y₃
 · internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₃)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x y₁) (P x y₃) =
(internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₂ y₃)
 #⊗ internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₂)
 · internal_comp (P x y₁) (P x y₂) (P x y₃)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x y₁) (P x y₃)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y₁ ⟧
(enriched_comp E₁ y₁ y₂ y₃
 · internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₃)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x y₁) (P x y₃) =
(internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₂ y₃)
 #⊗ internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₂)
 · internal_comp (P x y₁) (P x y₂) (P x y₃)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x y₁) (P x y₃)

· internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₃) #⊗ identity (P x y₁)
· internal_eval (P x y₁) (P x y₃) =
(internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₂ y₃)
 #⊗ internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₂)
 · internal_comp (P x y₁) (P x y₂) (P x y₃)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x y₁) (P x y₃)

z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y₁ ⟧
enriched_comp E₁ y₁ y₂ y₃ #⊗ h
· (internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₃)
   #⊗ identity (P x y₁)
   · internal_eval (P x y₁) (P x y₃)) =
(internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₂ y₃)
 #⊗ internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₂)
 · internal_comp (P x y₁) (P x y₂) (P x y₃)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x y₁) (P x y₃)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y₁ ⟧
enriched_comp E₁ y₁ y₂ y₃ #⊗ h · rmap_e P x y₁ y₃ =
(internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₂ y₃)
 #⊗ internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₂)
 · internal_comp (P x y₁) (P x y₂) (P x y₃)) #⊗ h

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y₁ ⟧
(internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₂ y₃)
 #⊗ internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₂)
 · internal_comp (P x y₁) (P x y₂) (P x y₃)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x y₁) (P x y₃) =
enriched_comp E₁ y₁ y₂ y₃ #⊗ h · rmap_e P x y₁ y₃

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y₁ ⟧
(internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₂ y₃)
 #⊗ internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₂)
 · internal_comp (P x y₁) (P x y₂) (P x y₃)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x y₁) (P x y₃) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y₁ ⟧
?b = enriched_comp E₁ y₁ y₂ y₃ #⊗ h · rmap_e P x y₁ y₃

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y₁ ⟧
(internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₂ y₃)
 #⊗ internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₂)
 · internal_comp (P x y₁) (P x y₂) (P x y₃)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x y₁) (P x y₃) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂

y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y₁ ⟧
(internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₂ y₃)
 #⊗ internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₂)) #⊗ h
· internal_comp (P x y₁) (P x y₂) (P x y₃)
  #⊗ identity (P x y₁)
· internal_eval (P x y₁) (P x y₃) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y₁ ⟧
(internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₂ y₃)
 #⊗ internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₂)) #⊗ h
· (internal_comp (P x y₁) (P x y₂) (P x y₃)
   #⊗ identity (P x y₁)
   · internal_eval (P x y₁) (P x y₃)) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y₁ ⟧
(internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₂ y₃)
 #⊗ internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₂)) #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (mon_lassociator (P x y₂ ⊸ P x y₃)
        (P x y₁ ⊸ P x y₂) (P x y₁)
      · identity (P x y₂ ⊸ P x y₃)
        #⊗ internal_eval (P x y₁) (P x y₂)
      · internal_eval (P x y₂) (P x y₃))
   #⊗ identity (P x y₁)
   · internal_eval (P x y₁) (P x y₃)) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y₁ ⟧
(internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₂ y₃)
 #⊗ internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₂)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P x y₂ ⊸ P x y₃) (P x y₁ ⊸ P x y₂)
     (P x y₁)
   · identity (P x y₂ ⊸ P x y₃)
     #⊗ internal_eval (P x y₁) (P x y₂)
   · internal_eval (P x y₂) (P x y₃)) = ?b

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y₁ ⟧
(internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₂ y₃)
 #⊗ internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₂)) #⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (P x y₂ ⊸ P x y₃) (P x y₁ ⊸ P x y₂)
    (P x y₁)
· identity (P x y₂ ⊸ P x y₃)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x y₁) (P x y₂)
· internal_eval (P x y₂) (P x y₃) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y₁ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) z
· internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₂ y₃)
  #⊗ (internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
· identity (P x y₂ ⊸ P x y₃)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x y₁) (P x y₂)
· internal_eval (P x y₂) (P x y₃) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y₁ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) z
· (internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₂ y₃)
   #⊗ (internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
   · (identity (P x y₂ ⊸ P x y₃)
      #⊗ internal_eval (P x y₁) (P x y₂)
      · internal_eval (P x y₂) (P x y₃))) = ?b

h: V ⟦ z, P x y₁ ⟧
internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₂ y₃)
#⊗ (internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
· (identity (P x y₂ ⊸ P x y₃)
   #⊗ internal_eval (P x y₁) (P x y₂)
   · internal_eval (P x y₂) (P x y₃)) = ?t2

· identity (P x y₂ ⊸ P x y₃)

#⊗ (internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₂) #⊗ h
    · internal_eval (P x y₁) (P x y₂)) = ?y'

h: V ⟦ z, P x y₁ ⟧

· internal_eval (P x y₁) (P x y₂) = ?t20

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂

y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y₁ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h
· internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₂) #⊗ identity (P x y₁)
· internal_eval (P x y₁) (P x y₂) = ?t20

y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁

· (internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₁ y₂)
   #⊗ identity (P x y₁)
   · internal_eval (P x y₁) (P x y₂)) = ?t20

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂

y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y₁ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h · rmap_e P x y₁ y₂ =
?t20

          apply idpath.

#⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h · rmap_e P x y₁ y₂)
· internal_eval (P x y₂) (P x y₃) = ?t2

· internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₂ y₃) #⊗ identity (P x y₂)
· internal_eval (P x y₂) (P x y₃) = ?t2

· (internal_lam (rmap_e P x y₂ y₃)
   #⊗ identity (P x y₂)
   · internal_eval (P x y₂) (P x y₃)) = ?t2
