#⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h · rmap_e P x y₁ y₂)
· rmap_e P x y₂ y₃ = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y₁ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) z
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
   #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h
       · rmap_e P x y₁ y₂) · rmap_e P x y₂ y₃) =
enriched_comp E₁ y₁ y₂ y₃ #⊗ h · rmap_e P x y₁ y₃

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y₁ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) z
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
   #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h)
   · identity (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
   · rmap_e P x y₂ y₃) =
enriched_comp E₁ y₁ y₂ y₃ #⊗ h · rmap_e P x y₁ y₃

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y₁ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) z
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· rmap_e P x y₂ y₃ =
enriched_comp E₁ y₁ y₂ y₃ #⊗ h · rmap_e P x y₁ y₃

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y₁ ⟧
(identity (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
#⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P x y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· rmap_e P x y₂ y₃ =
enriched_comp E₁ y₁ y₂ y₃ #⊗ h · rmap_e P x y₁ y₃

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y₁ ⟧
identity ((E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P x y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· rmap_e P x y₂ y₃ =
enriched_comp E₁ y₁ y₂ y₃ #⊗ h · rmap_e P x y₁ y₃

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y₁ ⟧
enriched_comp E₁ y₁ y₂ y₃ #⊗ h · rmap_e P x y₁ y₃ =
identity ((E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P x y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· rmap_e P x y₂ y₃

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y₁ ⟧
identity ((E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· enriched_comp E₁ y₁ y₂ y₃ #⊗ identity (P x y₁)
· rmap_e P x y₁ y₃ =
identity ((E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P x y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· rmap_e P x y₂ y₃

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y₁ ⟧
identity ((E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· (enriched_comp E₁ y₁ y₂ y₃ #⊗ identity (P x y₁)
   · rmap_e P x y₁ y₃) =
identity ((E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P x y₁)
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
      · rmap_e P x y₂ y₃))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x y₁ ⟧
enriched_comp E₁ y₁ y₂ y₃ #⊗ identity (P x y₁)
· rmap_e P x y₁ y₃ =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x y₁)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
   · rmap_e P x y₂ y₃)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
enriched_comp E₁ y₁ y₂ y₃ #⊗ identity (P x y₁)
· rmap_e P x y₁ y₃ =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x y₁)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
   · rmap_e P x y₂ y₃)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
enriched_comp E₁ y₁ y₂ y₃ #⊗ identity (P x y₁)
· rmap_e P x y₁ y₃ =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x y₁ y₂
· rmap_e P x y₂ y₃

      exact (rmap_e_comp P x y₁ y₂ y₃).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₂) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂)
#⊗ internal_lam (rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂)
· internal_comp (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· internal_lam (rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁)
· internal_comp (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂)
#⊗ internal_lam (rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂)
· internal_comp (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· internal_lam (rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁)
· internal_comp (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, P x₁ y₁ ⟧),
(internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂)
 #⊗ internal_lam (rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂)
 · internal_comp (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₂) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 · internal_lam (rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂)
   #⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁)
 · internal_comp (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
(internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂)
 #⊗ internal_lam (rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂)
 · internal_comp (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₂) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 · internal_lam (rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂)
   #⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁)
 · internal_comp (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
(internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂)
 #⊗ internal_lam (rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂)
 · internal_lam
     (mon_lassociator (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
        (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₁ y₂) (P x₁ y₁)
      · identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
        #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₂) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 · internal_lam (rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂)
   #⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁)
 · internal_lam
     (mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
        (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
      · identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
        #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂))) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
(internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂)
 #⊗ internal_lam (rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂)) #⊗ h
· internal_lam
    (mon_lassociator (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
       (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₁ y₂) (P x₁ y₁)
     · identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
       #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
     · internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂))
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ h
· (internal_lam (rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂)
   #⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁))
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· internal_lam
    (mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
       (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
     · identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
       #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
     · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂))
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
(internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂)
 #⊗ internal_lam (rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂)) #⊗ h
· (internal_lam
     (mon_lassociator (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
        (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₁ y₂) (P x₁ y₁)
      · (identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
         #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
         · internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂)))
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ h
· ((internal_lam (rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂)
    #⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁))
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · (internal_lam
        (mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
           (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
         · (identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
            #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
            · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)))
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
(internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂)
 #⊗ internal_lam (rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
     (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₁ y₂) (P x₁ y₁)
   · (identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
      #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ h
· ((internal_lam (rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂)
    #⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁))
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
        (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
      · (identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
         #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
         · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂))))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
(internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂)
 #⊗ internal_lam (rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
     (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₁ y₂) (P x₁ y₁)
   · (identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
      #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ h
· ((internal_lam (rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂)
    #⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁))
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
        (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
      · (identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
         #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
         · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂))))

z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
(internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂)
 #⊗ internal_lam (rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
     (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₁ y₂) (P x₁ y₁)
   · (identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
      #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂))) = ?b

h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
(internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂)
 #⊗ internal_lam (rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂)) #⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
    (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₁ y₂) (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) = ?b

x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁

h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) z
· internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ (internal_lam (rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
· identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) = ?b

mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) z
· (internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂)
   #⊗ (internal_lam (rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂) #⊗ h)
   · (identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
      #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂))) = ?b

h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧

    · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)) = ?y'

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category

y₁, y₂: C₁

h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
internal_lam (rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂) #⊗ h
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂) = ?t20

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h
· internal_lam (rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂) = ?t20

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h
· (internal_lam (rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)) = ?t20

          
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h · rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂ =
?t20

          apply idpath.

· internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) = ?t2

  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₂)

#⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) z
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
   · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ h
· ((internal_lam (rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂)
    #⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁))
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
        (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
      · (identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
         #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
         · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂))))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) z
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ h
· (internal_lam (rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂)
   #⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁))
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
    (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
(identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
#⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂ =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ h
· (internal_lam (rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂)
   #⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁))
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
    (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
(identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
#⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y₁)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
      · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ h
· ((internal_lam (rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂)
    #⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁))
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
        (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
      · (identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
         #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
         · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂))))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ h
· ((internal_lam (rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂)
    #⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁))
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
        (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
      · (identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
         #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
         · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)))) =
(identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
#⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y₁)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
      · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ h
· ((internal_lam (rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂)
    #⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁))
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
        (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
      · (identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
         #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
         · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)))) = 
?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
?b =
(identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
#⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y₁)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
      · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂))

#⊗ h
· ((internal_lam (rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂)
    #⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁))
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
        (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
      · (identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
         #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
         · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)))) =

 #⊗ internal_lam (lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁))

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
· rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂ = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y₁)
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
          #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
      · identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
      · rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂)) =
(identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
#⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y₁)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
      · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y₁)
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
          #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
      · identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
      · rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂)) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
?b =
(identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
#⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y₁)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
      · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y₁)
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
          #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
      · identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
      · rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂)) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ h = ?y'

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁) = ?y'

        apply idpath.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y₁)
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
          #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
      · identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
      · rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂)) =
(identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
#⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y₁)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
      · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        (P x₁ y₁)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
             #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁ · rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂)))) =
(identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
#⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y₁)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
      · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
        (P x₁ y₁)
      · (identity
           ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            ⊗ ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ P x₁ y₁))
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁ · rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂)))) =
identity ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y₁)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
      · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y₁)
   · (identity
        ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ P x₁ y₁))
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
         · rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂))) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
   · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y₁)
   · (identity
        ((E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ ((E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ P x₁ y₁))
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
         · rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂))) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
   · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y₁)
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
      · rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
   · lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁
· rmap_e P x₂ y₁ y₂ =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P x₁ y₁ y₂
· lmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₂

      exact (lmap_e_rmap_e P x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂).
  Qed.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂) E₁
  (self_enrichment V)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂) E₁
  (self_enrichment V)

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_data (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_laws ?F

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_data (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
 exact enriched_profunctor_to_whiskered_data.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_laws
  enriched_profunctor_to_whiskered_data
 exact enriched_profunctor_to_whiskered_laws.
  Defined.
End FromEnrichedProfunctor.

Section ToEnrichedProfunctor.
  Context {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
          {C₁ C₂ : category}
          {E₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
          {E₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
          (P : enriched_whiskered_bifunctor
                 (op_enrichment V E₂) E₁
                 (self_enrichment V)).

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
enriched_profunctor_data E₁ E₂

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
enriched_profunctor_data E₁ E₂

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
C₂ → C₁ → V
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₂) (y : C₁),
V ⟦ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ ?P x₁ y, ?P x₂ y ⟧
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
∏ (x : C₂) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
V ⟦ (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ ?P x y₁, ?P x y₂ ⟧

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
C₂ → C₁ → V
 exact (λ x y, P x y).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₂) (y : C₁),
V
⟦ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  ⊗ (λ (x : C₂) (y0 : C₁), P x y0) x₁ y,
(λ (x : C₂) (y0 : C₁), P x y0) x₂ y ⟧
 exact (λ x₁ x₂ y,
             enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y #⊗ identity _
             · internal_eval _ _).
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
∏ (x : C₂) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
V
⟦ (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  ⊗ (λ (x0 : C₂) (y : C₁), P x0 y) x y₁,
(λ (x0 : C₂) (y : C₁), P x0 y) x y₂ ⟧
 exact (λ x y₁ y₂,
             enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x y₁ y₂ #⊗ identity _
             · internal_eval _ _).
  Defined.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
enriched_profunctor_laws
  enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
enriched_profunctor_laws
  enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
∏ (x : C₂) (y : C₁),
enriched_id E₂ x
#⊗ identity
     (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data
        x y)
· lmap_e
    enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data x
    x y =
mon_lunitor
  (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data x y)
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
∏ (x : C₂) (y : C₁),
enriched_id E₁ y
#⊗ identity
     (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data
        x y)
· rmap_e
    enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data x
    y y =
mon_lunitor
  (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data x y)
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
∏ (x₁ x₂ x₃ : C₂) (y : C₁),
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁)
#⊗ identity
     (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data
        x₁ y)
· lmap_e
    enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data x₁
    x₃ y =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data x₁
     y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ lmap_e
       enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data
       x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e
    enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data x₂
    x₃ y
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
∏ (x : C₂) (y₁ y₂ y₃ : C₁),
enriched_comp E₁ y₁ y₂ y₃
#⊗ identity
     (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data
        x y₁)
· rmap_e
    enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data x
    y₁ y₃ =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data x
     y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ rmap_e
       enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data
       x y₁ y₂
· rmap_e
    enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data x
    y₂ y₃
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₂) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity
     (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data
        x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data
       x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ lmap_e
       enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data
       x₁ x₂ y₁
· rmap_e
    enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data x₂
    y₁ y₂ =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data x₁
     y₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ rmap_e
       enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data
       x₁ y₁ y₂
· lmap_e
    enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data x₁
    x₂ y₂

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
∏ (x : C₂) (y : C₁),
enriched_id E₂ x
#⊗ identity
     (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data
        x y)
· lmap_e
    enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data x
    x y =
mon_lunitor
  (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data x y)
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x: C₂
y: C₁
enriched_id E₂ x #⊗ identity (P x y)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x x y
   #⊗ identity (P x y) · internal_eval (P x y) (P x y)) =
mon_lunitor (P x y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x: C₂
y: C₁
enriched_id E₂ x #⊗ identity (P x y)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x x y
  #⊗ identity (P x y) · internal_eval (P x y) (P x y) =
mon_lunitor (P x y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x: C₂
y: C₁
(enriched_id E₂ x
 · enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x x y)
#⊗ identity (P x y) · internal_eval (P x y) (P x y) =
mon_lunitor (P x y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x: C₂
y: C₁
(enriched_id E₂ x
 · enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x x y)
#⊗ identity (P x y) · internal_eval (P x y) (P x y) =
?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x: C₂
y: C₁
?b = mon_lunitor (P x y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x: C₂
y: C₁
(enriched_id E₂ x
 · enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x x y)
#⊗ identity (P x y) · internal_eval (P x y) (P x y) =
?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x: C₂
y: C₁
enriched_id E₂ x
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x x y = ?y'

        exact (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left_id P x y).
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x: C₂
y: C₁
enriched_id (self_enrichment V) (P x y)
#⊗ identity (P x y) · internal_eval (P x y) (P x y) =
mon_lunitor (P x y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x: C₂
y: C₁
internal_id (P x y) #⊗ identity (P x y)
· internal_eval (P x y) (P x y) = mon_lunitor (P x y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x: C₂
y: C₁
internal_lam (mon_lunitor (P x y)) #⊗ identity (P x y)
· internal_eval (P x y) (P x y) = mon_lunitor (P x y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x: C₂
y: C₁
mon_lunitor (P x y) = mon_lunitor (P x y)

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)

∏ (x : C₂) (y : C₁),
enriched_id E₁ y
#⊗ identity
     (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data
        x y)
· rmap_e
    enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data x
    y y =
mon_lunitor
  (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data x y)

· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x y y
   #⊗ identity (P x y) · internal_eval (P x y) (P x y)) =
mon_lunitor (P x y)

C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
∏ (x₁ x₂ x₃ : C₂) (y : C₁),
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁)
#⊗ identity
     (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data
        x₁ y)
· lmap_e
    enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data x₁
    x₃ y =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data x₁
     y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ lmap_e
       enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data
       x₁ x₂ y
· lmap_e
    enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data x₂
    x₃ y
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₃ y
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
   · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₃ y)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y))
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y
   #⊗ identity (P x₂ y)
   · internal_eval (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₃ y
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₃ y) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y))
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y
  #⊗ identity (P x₂ y)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁
 · enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₃ y)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y) · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₃ y) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y))
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y
  #⊗ identity (P x₂ y)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁
 · enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₃ y)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y) · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₃ y) =
?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
?b =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y))
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y
  #⊗ identity (P x₂ y)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y)
