C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁
 · enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₃ y)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y) · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₃ y) =
?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
· enriched_comp E₂ x₃ x₂ x₁
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₃ y = ?y'

        exact (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left_comp P x₁ x₂ x₃ y).
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
(enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y
 #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y
 · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V) (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y)
     (P x₃ y)) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₃ y) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y))
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y
  #⊗ identity (P x₂ y)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
(enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y
 #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y
 · internal_comp (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y))
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y) · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₃ y) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y))
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y
  #⊗ identity (P x₂ y)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
(enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y
 #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· internal_comp (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₃ y) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y))
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y
  #⊗ identity (P x₂ y)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
(enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y
 #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· (internal_comp (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
   · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₃ y)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y
       #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
       · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y))
   · (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y
      #⊗ identity (P x₂ y)
      · internal_eval (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
(enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y
 #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· (internal_lam
     (mon_lassociator (P x₂ y ⊸ P x₃ y)
        (P x₁ y ⊸ P x₂ y) (P x₁ y)
      · identity (P x₂ y ⊸ P x₃ y)
        #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y)
      · internal_eval (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y))
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
   · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₃ y)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y
       #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
       · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y))
   · (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y
      #⊗ identity (P x₂ y)
      · internal_eval (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
(enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y
 #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· (mon_lassociator (P x₂ y ⊸ P x₃ y) (P x₁ y ⊸ P x₂ y)
     (P x₁ y)
   · identity (P x₂ y ⊸ P x₃ y)
     #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y)
   · internal_eval (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y
       #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
       · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y))
   · (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y
      #⊗ identity (P x₂ y)
      · internal_eval (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
(enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y
 #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
· mon_lassociator (P x₂ y ⊸ P x₃ y) (P x₁ y ⊸ P x₂ y)
    (P x₁ y)
· identity (P x₂ y ⊸ P x₃ y)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y))
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y
  #⊗ identity (P x₂ y)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y))
· identity (P x₂ y ⊸ P x₃ y)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y))
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y
  #⊗ identity (P x₂ y)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y) (P x₃ y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y))
· identity (P x₂ y ⊸ P x₃ y)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y))
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y
  #⊗ identity (P x₂ y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y
   #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y
       #⊗ identity (P x₁ y))
   · identity (P x₂ y ⊸ P x₃ y)
     #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y
       #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
       · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y))
   · enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y
     #⊗ identity (P x₂ y))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y
#⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y
    #⊗ identity (P x₁ y))
· identity (P x₂ y ⊸ P x₃ y)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y
    #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
    · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y))
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y
  #⊗ identity (P x₂ y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
(enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y
 · identity (P x₂ y ⊸ P x₃ y))
#⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y
    #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
    · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y)) =
(identity (E₂ ⦃ x₃, x₂ ⦄)
 · enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y)
#⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y
    #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
    · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y)
    · identity (P x₂ y))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y: C₁
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y
#⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y
    #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
    · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y)) =
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₂ x₃ y
#⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y
    #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
    · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y))

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
∏ (x : C₂) (y₁ y₂ y₃ : C₁),
enriched_comp E₁ y₁ y₂ y₃
#⊗ identity
     (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data
        x y₁)
· rmap_e
    enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data x
    y₁ y₃ =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data x
     y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ rmap_e
       enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data
       x y₁ y₂
· rmap_e
    enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data x
    y₂ y₃
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁: C₂
x₂, x₃, y: C₁
enriched_comp E₁ x₂ x₃ y #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ y
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
   · internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ y)) =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  (P x₁ x₂)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ x₃))
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₃)
   · internal_eval (P x₁ x₃) (P x₁ y))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁: C₂
x₂, x₃, y: C₁
enriched_comp E₁ x₂ x₃ y #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ y
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ y) =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  (P x₁ x₂)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ x₃))
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₃)
· internal_eval (P x₁ x₃) (P x₁ y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁: C₂
x₂, x₃, y: C₁
(enriched_comp E₁ x₂ x₃ y
 · enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ y)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ y) =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  (P x₁ x₂)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ x₃))
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₃)
· internal_eval (P x₁ x₃) (P x₁ y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁: C₂
x₂, x₃, y: C₁
(enriched_comp E₁ x₂ x₃ y
 · enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ y)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ y) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁: C₂
x₂, x₃, y: C₁
?b =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  (P x₁ x₂)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ x₃))
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₃)
· internal_eval (P x₁ x₃) (P x₁ y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁: C₂
x₂, x₃, y: C₁
(enriched_comp E₁ x₂ x₃ y
 · enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ y)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ y) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁: C₂
x₂, x₃, y: C₁
enriched_comp E₁ x₂ x₃ y
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ y = ?y'

        exact (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right_comp P x₁ x₂ x₃ y).
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁: C₂
x₂, x₃, y: C₁
(enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y
 #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃
 · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V) (P x₁ x₂)
     (P x₁ x₃) (P x₁ y)) #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ y) =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  (P x₁ x₂)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ x₃))
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₃)
· internal_eval (P x₁ x₃) (P x₁ y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁: C₂
x₂, x₃, y: C₁
(enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y
 #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃
 · internal_comp (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ x₃) (P x₁ y))
#⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ y) =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  (P x₁ x₂)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ x₃))
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₃)
· internal_eval (P x₁ x₃) (P x₁ y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁: C₂
x₂, x₃, y: C₁
(enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y
 #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
· internal_comp (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ x₃) (P x₁ y)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ y) =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  (P x₁ x₂)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ x₃))
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₃)
· internal_eval (P x₁ x₃) (P x₁ y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁: C₂
x₂, x₃, y: C₁
(enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y
 #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
· (internal_comp (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ x₃) (P x₁ y)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
   · internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ y)) =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  (P x₁ x₂)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄)
   #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃
       #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
       · internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ x₃))
   · (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₃)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ x₃) (P x₁ y)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁: C₂
x₂, x₃, y: C₁
(enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y
 #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
· (internal_lam
     (mon_lassociator (P x₁ x₃ ⊸ P x₁ y)
        (P x₁ x₂ ⊸ P x₁ x₃) (P x₁ x₂)
      · identity (P x₁ x₃ ⊸ P x₁ y)
        #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ x₃)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ x₃) (P x₁ y))
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
   · internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ y)) =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  (P x₁ x₂)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄)
   #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃
       #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
       · internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ x₃))
   · (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₃)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ x₃) (P x₁ y)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁: C₂
x₂, x₃, y: C₁
(enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y
 #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
· (mon_lassociator (P x₁ x₃ ⊸ P x₁ y)
     (P x₁ x₂ ⊸ P x₁ x₃) (P x₁ x₂)
   · identity (P x₁ x₃ ⊸ P x₁ y)
     #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ x₃)
   · internal_eval (P x₁ x₃) (P x₁ y)) =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  (P x₁ x₂)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄)
   #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃
       #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
       · internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ x₃))
   · (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₃)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ x₃) (P x₁ y)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁: C₂
x₂, x₃, y: C₁
(enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y
 #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
· mon_lassociator (P x₁ x₃ ⊸ P x₁ y)
    (P x₁ x₂ ⊸ P x₁ x₃) (P x₁ x₂)
· identity (P x₁ x₃ ⊸ P x₁ y)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ x₃)
· internal_eval (P x₁ x₃) (P x₁ y) =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  (P x₁ x₂)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ x₃))
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₃)
· internal_eval (P x₁ x₃) (P x₁ y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁: C₂
x₂, x₃, y: C₁
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  (P x₁ x₂)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂))
· identity (P x₁ x₃ ⊸ P x₁ y)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ x₃)
· internal_eval (P x₁ x₃) (P x₁ y) =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  (P x₁ x₂)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ x₃))
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₃)
· internal_eval (P x₁ x₃) (P x₁ y)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁: C₂
x₂, x₃, y: C₁
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  (P x₁ x₂)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂))
· identity (P x₁ x₃ ⊸ P x₁ y)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ x₃) =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  (P x₁ x₂)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ x₃))
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₃)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁: C₂
x₂, x₃, y: C₁
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  (P x₁ x₂)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y
   #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃
       #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂))
   · identity (P x₁ x₃ ⊸ P x₁ y)
     #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ x₃)) =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  (P x₁ x₂)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄)
   #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃
       #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
       · internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ x₃))
   · enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y
     #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₃))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁: C₂
x₂, x₃, y: C₁
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y
#⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃
    #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂))
· identity (P x₁ x₃ ⊸ P x₁ y)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ x₃) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄)
#⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃
    #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
    · internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ x₃))
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₃)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁: C₂
x₂, x₃, y: C₁
(enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y
 · identity (P x₁ x₃ ⊸ P x₁ y))
#⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃
    #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
    · internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ x₃)) =
(identity (E₁ ⦃ x₃, y ⦄)
 · enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y)
#⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃
    #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
    · internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ x₃)
    · identity (P x₁ x₃))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁: C₂
x₂, x₃, y: C₁
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y
#⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃
    #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
    · internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ x₃)) =
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₃ y
#⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ x₂ x₃
    #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
    · internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ x₃))

      apply idpath.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₂) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity
     (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data
        x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data
       x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ lmap_e
       enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data
       x₁ x₂ y₁
· rmap_e
    enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data x₂
    y₁ y₂ =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data x₁
     y₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ rmap_e
       enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data
       x₁ y₁ y₂
· lmap_e
    enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data x₁
    x₂ y₂
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁))
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ identity (P x₂ y₁)
   · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂))
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₂)
   · internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : V
         ⟦ (op_enrichment V E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄), P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂ ⟧,
   z #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₂))
  (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left_right P x₁ x₂
     y₁ y₂): (λ z : V
       ⟦ (op_enrichment V E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄), P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂ ⟧,
 z #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
 · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₂))
  (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
   #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁
        y₂
   · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V) (P x₁ y₁)
       (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂)) =
(λ z : V
       ⟦ (op_enrichment V E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄), P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂ ⟧,
 z #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
 · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₂))
  (sym_mon_braiding V
     (op_enrichment V E₂ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
     #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂
          y₁
   · enriched_comp (self_enrichment V) (P x₁ y₁)
       (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂))
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁))
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ identity (P x₂ y₁)
   · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂))
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₂)
   · internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : V ⟦ (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄),
         P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂ ⟧,
   z #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₂))
  (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left_right P x₁ x₂
     y₁ y₂): (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
 #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
 · internal_comp (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂))
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₂) =
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 · enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
 · internal_comp (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂))
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁))
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ identity (P x₂ y₁)
   · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂))
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₂)
   · internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
p: (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
 #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· internal_comp (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· internal_comp (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁))
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ identity (P x₂ y₁)
   · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂))
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₂)
   · internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
p: (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
 #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (internal_comp (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· ((enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
    #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂
         y₁) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · (internal_comp (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)))
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁))
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ identity (P x₂ y₁)
   · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂))
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₂)
   · internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
p: (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
 #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (internal_lam
     (mon_lassociator (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
        (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₁ y₂) (P x₁ y₁)
      · identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
        #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂))
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· ((enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
    #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂
         y₁) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · (internal_lam
        (mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
           (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
         · identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
           #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
         · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂))
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)))
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁))
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ identity (P x₂ y₁)
   · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂))
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₂)
   · internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
p: (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
 #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
     (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₁ y₂) (P x₁ y₁)
   · identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
     #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
   · internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· ((enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
    #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂
         y₁) #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
        (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
      · identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
        #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)))
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁))
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ identity (P x₂ y₁)
   · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂))
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₂)
   · internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
p: (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
 #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
    (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₁ y₂) (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
    (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁))
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ identity (P x₂ y₁)
   · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂))
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₂)
   · internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
p: mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁
        y₂ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
· identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
    (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
    (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁))
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ identity (P x₂ y₁)
   · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂))
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₂)
   · internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
p: mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁
        y₂ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
· identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
    (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y₁)
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
          #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
          · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁))
      · (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
         #⊗ identity (P x₂ y₁)
         · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)))) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
       #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
       · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂))
   · (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₂)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
p: mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁
        y₂ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
· identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
    (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
       #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
       · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂))
   · (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₂)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y₁)
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
          #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
          · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁))
      · (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
         #⊗ identity (P x₂ y₁)
         · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂))))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
p: mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁
        y₂ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
· identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
    (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
       #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
       · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂))
   · (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₂)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
p: mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁
        y₂ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
· identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
    (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y₁)
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
          #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
          · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁))
      · (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
         #⊗ identity (P x₂ y₁)
         · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂))))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
p: mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁
        y₂ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
· identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
    (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
       #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
       · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂))
   · (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₂)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂))) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
p: mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁
        y₂ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
· identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
    (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
    #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
    · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂))
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₂)
   · internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂)) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
p: mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁
        y₂ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
· identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
    (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)
identity (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
    #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
    · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂))
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) = ?t2

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
p: mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁
        y₂ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
· identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
    (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
#⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
    #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
    · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂))
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
p: mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁
        y₂ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
· identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
    (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
   #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
       #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
       · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂))
   · internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y₁)
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
          #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
          · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁))
      · (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
         #⊗ identity (P x₂ y₁)
         · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂))))

C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
p: mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁
        y₂ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
· identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
    (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
   #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
       #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
       · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂))
   · internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂)) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
p: mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁
        y₂ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
· identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
    (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y₁)
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
          #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
          · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁))
      · (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
         #⊗ identity (P x₂ y₁)
         · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂))))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
p: mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁
        y₂ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
· identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
    (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
   #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
       #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
       · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂))
   · internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂)) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
p: mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁
        y₂ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
· identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
    (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂))
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) = ?b

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V

  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
p: mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁
        y₂ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
· identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
    (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂))
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
· identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂)

p: mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁
        y₂ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
· identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)

#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
    (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)

  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)) =

  (P x₁ y₁)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
   #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
       #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
p: mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁
        y₂ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
· identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
    (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
#⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
    #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
    · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)) =
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
#⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
    #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
· identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
p: mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁
        y₂ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
· identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
    (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
#⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
    #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
    · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)) =
(enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
 · identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂))
#⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
    #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
    · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂))

        
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
p: mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁
        y₂ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
· identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
    (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
#⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
    #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
    · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)) =
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
#⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁ y₂
    #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
    · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂))

        apply idpath.
      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
p: mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₂
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₁ y₁
        y₂ #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
· identity (P x₁ y₂ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₁ y₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ y₂) (P x₂ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
    (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
    (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y₁)
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
          #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
          · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁))
      · (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
         #⊗ identity (P x₂ y₁)
         · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂))))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁)
  #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
    (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y₁)
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
          #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
          · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁))
      · (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
         #⊗ identity (P x₂ y₁)
         · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂))))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· ((enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
    #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁)
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
        (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
      · (identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
         #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
         · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
     (P x₁ y₁)
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
          #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
          · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁))
      · (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
         #⊗ identity (P x₂ y₁)
         · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂))))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
(enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
 #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· (mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
     (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
   · (identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
      #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂))) =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
       #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
       · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁))
   · (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
      #⊗ identity (P x₂ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
(enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
 #⊗ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁)
#⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
· mon_lassociator (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
    (P x₁ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₁) (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂) =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁))
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
  #⊗ identity (P x₂ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
· identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂) =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁))
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
  #⊗ identity (P x₂ y₁)
· internal_eval (P x₂ y₁) (P x₂ y₂)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
· identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁) =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
      #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
      · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁))
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
  #⊗ identity (P x₂ y₁)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
   #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
       #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
   · identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
     #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)) =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
  (P x₁ y₁)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
       #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
       · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁))
   · enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
     #⊗ identity (P x₂ y₁))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
#⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
    #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁))
· identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂)
  #⊗ internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
    #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
    · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁))
· enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
  #⊗ identity (P x₂ y₁)

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
(enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
 · identity (P x₂ y₁ ⊸ P x₂ y₂))
#⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
    #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
    · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)) =
(identity (E₁ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
 · enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂)
#⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
    #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
    · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)
    · identity (P x₂ y₁))

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
#⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
    #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
    · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁)) =
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right P x₂ y₁ y₂
#⊗ (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y₁
    #⊗ identity (P x₁ y₁)
    · internal_eval (P x₁ y₁) (P x₂ y₁))

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
enriched_profunctor_data E₁ E₂
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
enriched_profunctor_laws ?P

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
enriched_profunctor_data E₁ E₂
 exact enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
enriched_profunctor_laws
  enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_data
 exact enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor_laws.
  Defined.
End ToEnrichedProfunctor.

Section Inverses.
  Context {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
          {C₁ C₂ : category}
          {E₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
          {E₂ : enrichment C₂ V}.

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
enriched_profunctor_to_whiskered
  (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor P) = P

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
enriched_profunctor_to_whiskered
  (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor P) = P

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
isPredicate enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_laws
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
pr1
  (enriched_profunctor_to_whiskered
     (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor P)) =
pr1 P

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
isPredicate enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_laws

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_data
  (op_enrichment V E₂) E₁ (self_enrichment V)
isaprop (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_laws x)

      apply isaprop_enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_laws.
    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
pr1
  (enriched_profunctor_to_whiskered
     (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor P)) =
pr1 P

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
(λ (x₁ x₂ : C₂ ^opp) (y : C₁),
 internal_lam
   (lmap_e
      (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor P)
      x₁ x₂ y)),,
(λ (x : C₂ ^opp) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
 internal_lam
   (rmap_e
      (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor P) x
      y₁ y₂)) = pr21 P

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
(λ (x₁ x₂ : C₂ ^opp) (y : C₁),
 internal_lam
   (lmap_e
      (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor P)
      x₁ x₂ y)) = pr121 P
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
(λ (x : C₂ ^opp) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
 internal_lam
   (rmap_e
      (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor P) x
      y₁ y₂)) = pr221 P

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
(λ (x₁ x₂ : C₂ ^opp) (y : C₁),
 internal_lam
   (lmap_e
      (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor P)
      x₁ x₂ y)) = pr121 P
 
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁: C₂ ^opp
(λ (x₂ : C₂ ^opp) (y : C₁),
 internal_lam
   (lmap_e
      (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor P)
      x₁ x₂ y)) = (pr121 P) x₁

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂ ^opp
(λ y : C₁,
 internal_lam
   (lmap_e
      (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor P)
      x₁ x₂ y)) = (pr121 P) x₁ x₂

      
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂ ^opp
y: C₁
internal_lam
  (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
   · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y)) =
(pr121 P) x₁ x₂ y

C₁, C₂: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
x₁, x₂: C₂ ^opp
y: C₁
∏ (a : V) (h : V ⟦ a, (pr11 P) x₁ y ⟧),
internal_lam
  (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left P x₁ x₂ y
   #⊗ identity (P x₁ y)
   · internal_eval (P x₁ y) (P x₂ y)) #⊗ h
· internal_eval ((pr11 P) x₁ y) ((pr11 P) x₂ y) =
(pr121 P) x₁ x₂ y #⊗ h
· internal_eval ((pr11 P) x₁ y) ((pr11 P) x₂ y)

y: C₁
z: V
h: V ⟦ z, (pr11 P) x₁ y ⟧

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
  E₁ (self_enrichment V)
(λ (x : C₂ ^opp) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
 internal_lam
   (rmap_e
      (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor P) x
      y₁ y₂)) = pr221 P

  (enriched_profunctor_to_whiskered P) = P

C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
(λ (x₁ x₂ : C₂) (y : C₁),
 enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_left
   (enriched_profunctor_to_whiskered P) x₁ x₂ y
 #⊗ identity (enriched_profunctor_to_whiskered P x₁ y)
 · internal_eval
     (enriched_profunctor_to_whiskered P x₁ y)
     (enriched_profunctor_to_whiskered P x₂ y)),,
(λ (x : C₂) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
 enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_right
   (enriched_profunctor_to_whiskered P) x y₁ y₂
 #⊗ identity (enriched_profunctor_to_whiskered P x y₁)
 · internal_eval
     (enriched_profunctor_to_whiskered P x y₁)
     (enriched_profunctor_to_whiskered P x y₂)) =
pr21 P

 · internal_eval
     (enriched_profunctor_to_whiskered P x₁ y)
     (enriched_profunctor_to_whiskered P x₂ y)) =
pr121 P

 #⊗ identity

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
