x₂, y: C₁
internal_lam (rmap_e P x₁ x₂ y) #⊗ identity (P x₁ x₂)
· internal_eval (P x₁ x₂) (P x₁ y) = (pr221 P) x₁ x₂ y

      apply internal_beta.
  Qed.
End Inverses.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂) E₁
  (self_enrichment V) ≃ enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂) E₁
  (self_enrichment V) ≃ enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂) E₁
  (self_enrichment V) → enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
→ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂) E₁
    (self_enrichment V)
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
∏
x : enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
      E₁ (self_enrichment V), ?g (?f x) = x
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
∏ y : enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂, ?f (?g y) = y

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂) E₁
  (self_enrichment V) → enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
 exact enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor.
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
→ enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂) E₁
    (self_enrichment V)
 exact enriched_profunctor_to_whiskered.
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
∏
x : enriched_whiskered_bifunctor (op_enrichment V E₂)
      E₁ (self_enrichment V),
enriched_profunctor_to_whiskered
  (enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor x) = x
 exact enriched_profunctor_whiskered_bifunctor_weq_left.
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
∏ y : enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂,
enriched_whiskered_bifunctor_to_profunctor
  (enriched_profunctor_to_whiskered y) = y
 exact enriched_profunctor_whiskered_bifunctor_weq_right.
Defined.

Definition enriched_profunctor_bifunctor_weq
           {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (E₁ : enrichment C₁ V)
           (E₂ : enrichment C₂ V)
  : enriched_functor
      (tensor_enriched_precat (op_enrichment V E₂) E₁)
      (make_enriched_cat (pr111 V ,, self_enrichment V))
    ≃
    (E₁ ↛e E₂)
  := (enriched_profunctor_whiskered_bifunctor_weq _ _
      ∘ enriched_bifunctor_whiskered_bifunctor_weq _ _ _)%weq.

(** * 4. Action on morphisms in the underlying category *)
Definition lmap_e_arr
           {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {E₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
           {E₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
           (P : E₁ ↛e E₂)
           (x : C₁)
           {y₁ y₂ : C₂}
           (g : y₂ --> y₁)
  : P y₁ x --> P y₂ x
  := mon_linvunitor _
     · (enriched_from_arr _ g #⊗ identity _)
     · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x.

Definition rmap_e_arr
           {V : sym_mon_closed_cat}
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {E₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
           {E₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
           (P : E₁ ↛e E₂)
           {x₁ x₂ : C₁}
           (f : x₁ --> x₂)
           (y : C₂)
  : P y x₁ --> P y x₂
  := mon_linvunitor _
     · (enriched_from_arr _ f #⊗ identity _)
     · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y: C₂
lmap_e_arr P x (identity y) = identity (P y x)


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y: C₂
lmap_e_arr P x (identity y) = identity (P y x)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (P y x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (identity y)
  #⊗ identity (P y x) · lmap_e P y y x =
identity (P y x)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (P y x)
· enriched_id E₂ y #⊗ identity (P y x)
· lmap_e P y y x = identity (P y x)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (P y x)
· (enriched_id E₂ y #⊗ identity (P y x)
   · lmap_e P y y x) = identity (P y x)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (P y x) · mon_lunitor (P y x) =
identity (P y x)

  apply mon_linvunitor_lunitor.
Qed.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
lmap_e_arr P x (g₂ · g₁) =
lmap_e_arr P x g₁ · lmap_e_arr P x g₂


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
lmap_e_arr P x (g₂ · g₁) =
lmap_e_arr P x g₁ · lmap_e_arr P x g₂

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ (g₂ · g₁) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₃ x =
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x
· (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x)
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂ #⊗ identity (P y₂ x)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₃ x)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂
   · enriched_comp E₂ y₃ y₂ y₁) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₃ x =
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x
· (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x)
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂ #⊗ identity (P y₂ x)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₃ x)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂
   · enriched_comp E₂ y₃ y₂ y₁) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₃ x =
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x · mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂ #⊗ identity (P y₂ x)
· lmap_e P y₂ y₃ x

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁
      #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
   · enriched_comp E₂ y₃ y₂ y₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x))
· lmap_e P y₁ y₃ x =
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x · mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂ #⊗ identity (P y₂ x)
· lmap_e P y₂ y₃ x

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁
      #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
   · (enriched_comp E₂ y₃ y₂ y₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
      · lmap_e P y₁ y₃ x)) =
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
   · (lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x
      · (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x)
         · (enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂
            #⊗ identity (P y₂ x) · lmap_e P y₂ y₃ x))))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁
      #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
      · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
      · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x
      · lmap_e P y₂ y₃ x)) =
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
   · (lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x
      · (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x)
         · (enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂
            #⊗ identity (P y₂ x) · lmap_e P y₂ y₃ x))))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x
· lmap_e P y₂ y₃ x =
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x · mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂ #⊗ identity (P y₂ x)
· lmap_e P y₂ y₃ x

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x =
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x · mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂ #⊗ identity (P y₂ x)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁
      #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x))) =
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
   · (lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x
      · (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x)
         · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂
           #⊗ identity (P y₂ x))))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁
      #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
?b =
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
   · (lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x
      · (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x)
         · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂
           #⊗ identity (P y₂ x))))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁
      #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x)
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x))) = ?b

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
(mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
 · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂)
#⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
        (P y₁ x)
      · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x)) =
?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
(mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
 · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂)
#⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x = ?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
(mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
 · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄))
#⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x = ?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
(mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
 · (enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂
    · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄))) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x) =
?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
(mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
 · (sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂
      #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁))
#⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x) =
?t2

(mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
 · sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} I_{ V}
 · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂ #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁)
#⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x = ?t2

 · sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} I_{ V})

· (enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂ #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)

    (P y₁ x)

   #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)

· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
(enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂ #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁)
#⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x = ?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x = ?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂
   #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x))
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x) =
?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂ · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
      · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x) = ?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
      · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x) = ?t2

    apply idpath.
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} I_{ V})
   #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
   · (mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
      · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂
        #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁
            #⊗ identity (P y₁ x) · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x))) =
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
   · (lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x
      · (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x)
         · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂
           #⊗ identity (P y₂ x))))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
   · (lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x
      · (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x)
         · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂
           #⊗ identity (P y₂ x)))) =
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} I_{ V})
   #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
   · (mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
      · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂
        #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁
            #⊗ identity (P y₁ x) · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x)))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
   · (lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x
      · (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x)
         · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂
           #⊗ identity (P y₂ x)))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
?b =
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} I_{ V})
   #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
   · (mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
      · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂
        #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁
            #⊗ identity (P y₁ x) · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x)))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
   · (lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x
      · (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x)
         · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂
           #⊗ identity (P y₂ x)))) = ?b

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· (lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x
   · (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x)
      · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂ #⊗ identity (P y₂ x))) =
?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x · mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂ #⊗ identity (P y₂ x) = ?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂

y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (I_{ V} ⊗ P y₁ x)
· identity I_{ V}
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
      · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂ #⊗ identity (P y₂ x) = ?t2

· (identity I_{ V}
   #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
       · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x)
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂ #⊗ identity (P y₂ x)) =
?t2

    · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂ #⊗ identity (P y₂ x) = ?t2

#⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
    · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x · identity (P y₂ x)) = ?t2

    · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x · identity (P y₂ x)) = ?t2

#⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
    · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x) = ?t2

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· (mon_linvunitor (I_{ V} ⊗ P y₁ x)
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂
     #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
         · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x)) =
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} I_{ V})
   #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
   · (mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
      · enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂
        #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁
            #⊗ identity (P y₁ x) · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x)))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· mon_linvunitor (I_{ V} ⊗ P y₁ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
      · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x) =
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} I_{ V})
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g₂
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
      · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· mon_linvunitor (I_{ V} ⊗ P y₁ x) =
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} I_{ V})
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (P y₁ x)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· mon_linvunitor (I_{ V} ⊗ P y₁ x) =
mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} I_{ V})
   #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
   · mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (P y₁ x))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (I_{ V} ⊗ P y₁ x) =
(mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
 · sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} I_{ V})
#⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (P y₁ x)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (P y₁ x) =
(mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
 · sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} I_{ V})
#⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (P y₁ x)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V} =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} I_{ V}

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V} = mon_rinvunitor I_{ V}

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
g₂: C₂ ⟦ y₃, y₂ ⟧
mon_rinvunitor I_{ V} = mon_rinvunitor I_{ V}

  apply idpath.
Qed.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y: C₂
rmap_e_arr P (identity x) y = identity (P y x)


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y: C₂
rmap_e_arr P (identity x) y = identity (P y x)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (P y x)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ (identity x)
  #⊗ identity (P y x) · rmap_e P y x x =
identity (P y x)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (P y x)
· enriched_id E₁ x #⊗ identity (P y x)
· rmap_e P y x x = identity (P y x)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (P y x)
· (enriched_id E₁ x #⊗ identity (P y x)
   · rmap_e P y x x) = identity (P y x)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (P y x) · mon_lunitor (P y x) =
identity (P y x)

  apply mon_linvunitor_lunitor.
Qed.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
rmap_e_arr P (f₁ · f₂) y =
rmap_e_arr P f₁ y · rmap_e_arr P f₂ y


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
rmap_e_arr P (f₁ · f₂) y =
rmap_e_arr P f₁ y · rmap_e_arr P f₂ y

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ (f₁ · f₂) #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₃ =
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
· (mon_linvunitor (P y x₂)
   · enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂ #⊗ identity (P y x₂)
   · rmap_e P y x₂ x₃)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁
   · enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₃ =
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
· (mon_linvunitor (P y x₂)
   · enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂ #⊗ identity (P y x₂)
   · rmap_e P y x₂ x₃)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁
   · enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₃ =
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ · mon_linvunitor (P y x₂)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂ #⊗ identity (P y x₂)
· rmap_e P y x₂ x₃

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂
      #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁) #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
   · enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃ #⊗ identity (P y x₁))
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₃ =
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ · mon_linvunitor (P y x₂)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂ #⊗ identity (P y x₂)
· rmap_e P y x₂ x₃

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂
      #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁) #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
   · (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
      · rmap_e P y x₁ x₃)) =
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· (enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
   · (rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
      · (mon_linvunitor (P y x₂)
         · (enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂
            #⊗ identity (P y x₂) · rmap_e P y x₂ x₃))))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂
      #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁) #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (P y x₁)
      · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
      · rmap_e P y x₂ x₃)) =
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· (enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
   · (rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
      · (mon_linvunitor (P y x₂)
         · (enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂
            #⊗ identity (P y x₂) · rmap_e P y x₂ x₃))))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁) #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
· rmap_e P y x₂ x₃ =
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ · mon_linvunitor (P y x₂)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂ #⊗ identity (P y x₂)
· rmap_e P y x₂ x₃

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁) #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ =
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ · mon_linvunitor (P y x₂)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂ #⊗ identity (P y x₂)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂
      #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁) #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (P y x₁)
      · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂)) =
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· (enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
   · (rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
      · (mon_linvunitor (P y x₂)
         · enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂
           #⊗ identity (P y x₂))))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂
      #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁) #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (P y x₁)
      · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂)) =
?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
?b =
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· (enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
   · (rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
      · (mon_linvunitor (P y x₂)
         · enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂
           #⊗ identity (P y x₂))))

y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂

   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (P y x₁)
      · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂)) =
?b

C₁, C₂: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧

(mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
 · enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂ #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁)
#⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P y x₁)
   · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂) =
?t2

· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ = ?t2

· enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁ #⊗ identity (P y x₁))
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ = ?t2

   · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂) =

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (P y x₁)
· (enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂ · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄))
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
      · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂) = ?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (P y x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
      · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂) = ?t2

    apply idpath.
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· (mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
   · (mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (P y x₁)
      · enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂
        #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁
            #⊗ identity (P y x₁) · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂))) =
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· (enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
   · (rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
      · (mon_linvunitor (P y x₂)
         · enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂
           #⊗ identity (P y x₂))))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· (enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
   · (rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
      · (mon_linvunitor (P y x₂)
         · enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂
           #⊗ identity (P y x₂)))) =
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· (mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
   · (mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (P y x₁)
      · enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂
        #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁
            #⊗ identity (P y x₁) · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂)))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· (enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
   · (rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
      · (mon_linvunitor (P y x₂)
         · enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂
           #⊗ identity (P y x₂)))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
?b =
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· (mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
   · (mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (P y x₁)
      · enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂
        #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁
            #⊗ identity (P y x₁) · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂)))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂

f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· (enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
   · (rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
      · (mon_linvunitor (P y x₂)
         · enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂
           #⊗ identity (P y x₂)))) = ?b

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· (rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
   · (mon_linvunitor (P y x₂)
      · enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂ #⊗ identity (P y x₂))) =
?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ · mon_linvunitor (P y x₂)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂ #⊗ identity (P y x₂) = ?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (I_{ V} ⊗ P y x₁)
· identity I_{ V}
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
      · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂ #⊗ identity (P y x₂) = ?t2

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂

f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (I_{ V} ⊗ P y x₁)
· (identity I_{ V}
   #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
       · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂)
   · enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂ #⊗ identity (P y x₂)) =
?t2

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂

f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
identity I_{ V}
#⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
    · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂ #⊗ identity (P y x₂) = ?t2

E₂: enrichment C₂ V

f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
(identity I_{ V} · enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂)
#⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
    · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ · identity (P y x₂)) = ?t2

f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂
#⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
    · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂ · identity (P y x₂)) = ?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂
#⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
    · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂) = ?t2

    apply idpath.
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· (mon_linvunitor (I_{ V} ⊗ P y x₁)
   · enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂
     #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
         · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂)) =
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· (mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
   · (mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (P y x₁)
      · enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂
        #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁
            #⊗ identity (P y x₁) · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂)))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· mon_linvunitor (I_{ V} ⊗ P y x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
      · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂) =
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (P y x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f₂
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₁ f₁ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
      · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· mon_linvunitor (I_{ V} ⊗ P y x₁) =
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (P y x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· mon_linvunitor (I_{ V} ⊗ P y x₁) =
mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· (mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
   · mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (P y x₁))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor (I_{ V} ⊗ P y x₁) =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (P y x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
y: C₂
mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (P y x₁) =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (P y x₁)

  apply idpath.
Qed.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e_arr P x g
· lmap_e P y₂ y₃ x =
postcomp_arr E₂ y₃ g #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₃ x


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e_arr P x g
· lmap_e P y₂ y₃ x =
postcomp_arr E₂ y₃ g #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₃ x

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
    · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x) · lmap_e P y₂ y₃ x =
postcomp_arr E₂ y₃ g #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₃ x

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₁ x))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x
· lmap_e P y₂ y₃ x =
postcomp_arr E₂ y₃ g #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₃ x

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₁ x))
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₃ x) =
postcomp_arr E₂ y₃ g #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₃ x

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₁ x))
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
   · enriched_comp E₂ y₃ y₂ y₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
   · lmap_e P y₁ y₃ x) =
postcomp_arr E₂ y₃ g #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₃ x

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₁ x))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ y₃ y₂ y₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₃ x =
postcomp_arr E₂ y₃ g #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· lmap_e P y₁ y₃ x

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₁ x))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ y₃ y₂ y₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x) =
postcomp_arr E₂ y₃ g #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₁ x))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ y₃ y₂ y₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x) =
(mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
 · enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E₂ y₃ y₂ y₁) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₁ x))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ y₃ y₂ y₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x) =
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· enriched_comp E₂ y₃ y₂ y₁ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₁ x))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x) =
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₁ x))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x) =
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₁ x))
   · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
        (P y₁ x)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x))) =
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)

identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₁ x))
   · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
        (P y₁ x)
      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x))) = 
?b

· (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)

· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₁ x))
   · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)

      · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)

x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧

identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₁ x))
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)) = ?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₁ x))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x) = ?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ g)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x) = ?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
· ((identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ g)
   #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)) = ?t2

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ g
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x) = ?t2

C₁, C₂: category

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ g
     #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x) =
?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
   #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ g
      #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄))
     #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)) = ?t2

    apply idpath.
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
      #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
      · (enriched_from_arr E₂ g
         #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄))
        #⊗ identity (P y₁ x))) =
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x) =
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)

y₃: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x) =
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x) =
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)

g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category

x: C₁

g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
?b =
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category

x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x) = ?b

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₁ x) =
?y'

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₁ x)
   · mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₁ x)) =
?y'

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ I_{ V} ⊗ P y₁ x) = ?y'

    apply id_right.
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x) =
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
(mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄)
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V})
#⊗ identity (P y₁ x) =
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₂, y₁ ⟧
y₃: C₂
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x) =
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₃, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x)

  apply idpath.
Qed.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e_arr P f y₁
· lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₂ =
lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₁ · rmap_e_arr P f y₂


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e_arr P f y₁
· lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₂ =
lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₁ · rmap_e_arr P f y₂

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
    · rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂) · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₂ =
lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₁
· (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
   · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
   · rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂
· lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₂ =
lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₁
· (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
   · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
   · rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁))
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂
   · lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₂) =
lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₁
· (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
   · (enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
      · rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁))
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x₁)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
       (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
   · mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
       (P y₁ x₁)
   · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₁
   · rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂) =
lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₁
· (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
   · (enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
      · rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₁
· rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ =
lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₁ · mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₁ =
lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₁ · mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₁ =
mon_linvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₁
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁))
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
        (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)
         · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₁))) =
mon_linvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₁
   · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_linvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₁
   · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁))
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
        (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)
         · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₁)))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_linvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₁
   · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)) =
?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
?b =
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁))
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
        (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)
         · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₁)))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_linvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₁
   · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)) =
?b

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_linvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₁ = ?b

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_linvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)
· (enriched_from_arr E₁ f
   #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)
   · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₁) =
?b

    apply idpath.
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_linvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)
· (enriched_from_arr E₁ f
   #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)
   · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₁) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁))
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
        (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)
         · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₁)))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_linvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₁ =
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₁ y₂ x₁

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_linvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x₁) =
mon_linvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x₁) =
mon_linvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x₁)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁))
   · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (P y₁ x₁)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
         · mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)))) =
mon_linvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x₁)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁))
   · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (P y₁ x₁)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
         · mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
?b =
mon_linvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x₁)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁))
   · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (P y₁ x₁)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
         · mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)))) = ?b

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
#⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁))
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
        (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
      · mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁))) = ?t2

#⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁))
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
    (P y₁ x₁) = ?t2

· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ f)

#⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
· (enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄))

#⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
· ((enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄))
   #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
   · mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)

#⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
· (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)
   · enriched_from_arr E₁ f
     #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
         #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁))) = ?t2

    apply idpath.
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₁ x₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
      #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
      · (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
           (P y₁ x₁)
         · enriched_from_arr E₁ f
           #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
               #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁))))) =
mon_linvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x₁)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₁ x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f
  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)) =
mon_linvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)

· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₁ x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₁ f
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁) =

· enriched_from_arr E₁ f
  #⊗ identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)

identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (P y₁ x₁)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₁ x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁) =

f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₁ x₁)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₁ x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁) =
mon_linvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)

· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₁ x₁)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₁ x₁)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) I_{ V}

y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) I_{ V}
  #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁) =
mon_linvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
(mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄)
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) I_{ V})
#⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁) =
mon_linvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_linvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁) =
mon_linvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
mon_linvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁) =
mon_linvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₁ ⦄) ⊗ P y₁ x₁)

  apply idpath.
Qed.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
x₃: C₁
y: C₂
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e_arr P f y
· rmap_e P y x₂ x₃ =
precomp_arr E₁ x₃ f #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₃


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
x₃: C₁
y: C₂
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e_arr P f y
· rmap_e P y x₂ x₃ =
precomp_arr E₁ x₃ f #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₃

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
x₃: C₁
y: C₂
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
    · rmap_e P y x₁ x₂) · rmap_e P y x₂ x₃ =
precomp_arr E₁ x₃ f #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₃

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
x₃: C₁
y: C₂
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y x₁))
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
· rmap_e P y x₂ x₃ =
precomp_arr E₁ x₃ f #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₃

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
x₃: C₁
y: C₂
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y x₁))
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y x₁ x₂
   · rmap_e P y x₂ x₃) =
precomp_arr E₁ x₃ f #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₃

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
x₃: C₁
y: C₂
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y x₁))
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P y x₁)
   · enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
   · rmap_e P y x₁ x₃) =
precomp_arr E₁ x₃ f #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₃

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
x₃: C₁
y: C₂
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y x₁))
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁)
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₃ =
precomp_arr E₁ x₃ f #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· rmap_e P y x₁ x₃

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
x₃: C₁
y: C₂
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y x₁))
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁)
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃ #⊗ identity (P y x₁) =
precomp_arr E₁ x₃ f #⊗ identity (P y x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
x₃: C₁
y: C₂
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y x₁))
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁)
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃ #⊗ identity (P y x₁) =
(mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
 · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ f
 · enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃) #⊗ identity (P y x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
x₃: C₁
y: C₂
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y x₁))
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁)
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃ #⊗ identity (P y x₁) =
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ f)
  #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃ #⊗ identity (P y x₁)

x₃: C₁

#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y x₁))
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁) =
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ f)
  #⊗ identity (P y x₁)

x₃: C₁
y: C₂
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y x₁))
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y x₁) =
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ f)
  #⊗ identity (P y x₁)

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
