f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
x₃: C₁
y: C₂
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
   #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₁ f #⊗ identity (P y x₁))
   · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (P y x₁)) =
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ f)
  #⊗ identity (P y x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
x₃: C₁
y: C₂
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y x₁)
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
      #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ f) #⊗ identity (P y x₁)) =
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ f)
  #⊗ identity (P y x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
x₃: C₁
y: C₂
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y x₁)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ f)
  #⊗ identity (P y x₁) =
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₁ f)
  #⊗ identity (P y x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
x₃: C₁
y: C₂
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (P y x₁)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y x₁) =
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
x₃: C₁
y: C₂
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y x₁)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y x₁) =
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
x₃: C₁
y: C₂
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y x₁)
   · mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y x₁)) =
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
x₃: C₁
y: C₂
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y x₁)
· identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ I_{ V} ⊗ P y x₁) =
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y x₁)

  apply id_right.
Qed.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e_arr P x₁ f
· rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ =
rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ · lmap_e_arr P x₂ f


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e_arr P x₁ f
· rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ =
rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ · lmap_e_arr P x₂ f

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
    · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁) · rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ =
rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂
· (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₂)
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁
· rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ =
rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂
· (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₂)
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁
   · rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂) =
rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂
· (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₂)
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
      · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x₁)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (P y₂ x₁)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂) =
rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂
· (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₂)
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
      · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂ =
rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ · mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₂)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ =
rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ · mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₂)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ =
mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂
· enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂))) =
mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂)))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)) =
?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
?b =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂)))

· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)) =

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ f
   #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂) =
?b

    apply idpath.
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ f
   #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
      · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂)))

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁

f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

· enriched_from_arr E₂ f
  #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂ =

#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
    · enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₁ x₂

V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁) =
mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ f
  #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P y₂ x₁)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
         · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
             (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)))) =
mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ f
  #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)

   #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
         · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
             (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)))) = ?b

#⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
      · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁))) = ?t2

identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁) = ?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₂ x₁)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ f)
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁) = ?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₂ x₁)
· ((identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ f)
   #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
      · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁))) = ?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
(identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ f)
#⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (P y₂ x₁)) = ?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
(identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ f)
#⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁) = ?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
(identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E₂ f
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
#⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁) = ?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
(sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
 · enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
#⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁) = ?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
#⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₁) = ?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
#⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· ((enriched_from_arr E₂ f #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
       (P y₂ x₁)) = ?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
#⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ f
     #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))) = ?t2

    apply idpath.
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₂ x₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
      #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
      · (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
           (P y₂ x₁)
         · enriched_from_arr E₂ f
           #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
               #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))))) =
mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ f
  #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₂ x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ f
  #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)) =
mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ f
  #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₂ x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ f
  #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁) =
mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ f
  #⊗ identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₂ x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁) =
mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₂ x₁)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₂ x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁) =
mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₂ x₁)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₂ x₁)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
         #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
         · mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             (P y₂ x₁)))) =
mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₂ x₁)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₂ x₁)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
         #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
         · mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             (P y₂ x₁)))) = ?b
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
?b = mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₂ x₁)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₂ x₁)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
         #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
         · mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
             (P y₂ x₁)))) = ?b

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₂ x₁)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₂ x₁)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
      #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
      · mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
          (P y₂ x₁))) = ?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₂ x₁)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V} (P y₂ x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁) =
?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ I_{ V} ⊗ P y₂ x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁) =
?t2

    
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
#⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁) =
?t2

    apply idpath.
  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
   #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
   · mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁)) =
mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁) =
mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
(mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
 · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V})
#⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁) =
mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₂ x₁) =
mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁) =
mon_linvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ P y₂ x₁)

  apply idpath.
Qed.


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lmap_e_arr P x₂ g · rmap_e_arr P f y₁ =
rmap_e_arr P f y₂ · lmap_e_arr P x₁ g


V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
lmap_e_arr P x₂ g · rmap_e_arr P f y₁ =
rmap_e_arr P f y₂ · lmap_e_arr P x₁ g

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₂)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂ · rmap_e_arr P f y₁ =
rmap_e_arr P f y₂
· (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₂)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
   · (lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂ · rmap_e_arr P f y₁)) =
rmap_e_arr P f y₂
· (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
      · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₂)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e_arr P f y₂
      · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁)) =
rmap_e_arr P f y₂
· (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
   · (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
      · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₂)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e_arr P f y₂
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁ =
rmap_e_arr P f y₂ · mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₁

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₂)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e_arr P f y₂ =
rmap_e_arr P f y₂ · mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₂)
· (enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e_arr P f y₂) =
rmap_e_arr P f y₂
· (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₂)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ rmap_e_arr P f y₂ =
rmap_e_arr P f y₂
· (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₂)
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ rmap_e_arr P f y₂
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)) =
rmap_e_arr P f y₂
· (mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
   · enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁))

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₂)
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ rmap_e_arr P f y₂
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁) =
rmap_e_arr P f y₂ · mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₁)
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)

  
V: sym_mon_closed_cat
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₂, x₁ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₂)
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ rmap_e_arr P f y₂
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁) =
mon_linvunitor (P y₂ x₂)
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ rmap_e_arr P f y₂
· enriched_from_arr E₂ g #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₁)

  apply idpath.
Qed.
